access_token.description: An access token that can be exchanged for a user profile. Access tokens are short-lived — see the `expires_in` field for the exact lifetime.

expires_in.description: The lifetime of the access token in seconds.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization the user belongs to.

connection_id.description: The ID of the SSO connection used for authentication.

idp_id.description: The user's unique identifier from the identity provider.

role.description: The role assigned to the user within the organization, if applicable.

slug.description: The slug of the assigned role.

oneOf.description: The primary role assigned to the user.
oneOf.title: SlimRole

roles.description: The roles assigned to the user within the organization, if applicable.

slug.description: The slug of the assigned role.

items.description: The primary role assigned to the user.
items.title: SlimRole

groups.description: The groups the user belongs to, as returned by the identity provider.

custom_attributes.description: Custom attribute mappings defined for the connection, returned as key-value pairs.

raw_attributes.description: The complete set of raw attributes returned by the identity provider.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: The user profile returned by the identity provider.

provider.description: The OAuth provider used for authentication.

refresh_token.description: The refresh token from the OAuth provider.

access_token.description: The access token from the OAuth provider.

expires_at.description: The timestamp at which the access token expires.

scopes.description: A list of OAuth scopes for which the access token is authorized.

oauth_tokens.description: OAuth tokens issued by the identity provider, if available.

error_description.description: A human-readable description of the error.
A human-readable description of the error.
error_description.example: The client is not authorized to use this grant type.

error_description.description: A human-readable description of the error.
error_description.example: The code has expired or has already been used.

error_description.description: A human-readable description of the error.
error_description.example: The grant type is not supported.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
